mapper.sql: id, template_code, template_name, category, description, current_version, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template (template_code, template_name, category, description, current_version, status, remark, create_by) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{category}, #{description}, #{currentVersion}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template
template_name = #{templateName}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, current_version = #{currentVersion}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_template SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
